input_dict.question: Hail Flutie was a call made at the game with which managing editor at Vegas Stats and Information Network calling the action?
input_dict.target_summary: The Hail Flutie game was televised nationally by CBS, with Brent Musburger listed as one of the commentators (alongside Ara Parseghian and Pat Haden). Brent Woody Musburger is an American sportscaster who serves as lead broadcaster and managing editor at the Vegas Stats and Information Network (VSiN).
input_dict.candidate_summary: The question asks whether Brent Musburger called the 'Hail Flutie' play. The Hail Flutie page lists Brent Musburger among the CBS commentators (Hail Flutie), and his page identifies him as "managing editor at Vegas Stats and Information Network (VSiN)" (Brent Musburger). Therefore Brent Musburger, managing editor at Vegas Stats and Information Network (VSiN), was the announcer who called the action; Retain this fact for final-answer agent.
